# Bamberg Digital

> AI-native digital marketing agency. Agentic AI Management for SMBs scaling automation across marketing, ops, and sales.

Bamberg Digital is a Sacramento, California-based founder-led digital agency specializing in AI-native marketing systems, agentic AI management, custom website design, SEO, and lead generation for small businesses nationwide. Founded by Jason Bamberg, the agency deploys autonomous AI agents that execute work — content, outreach, ops automation — rather than only delivering reports. Pricing: Starter $997/mo, Growth $2,500/mo, Atelier $5K/mo. 47+ projects shipped; 47 industry-specific website blueprints across verticals from dental to breweries to law firms.

## Key Pages

- [Home](https://www.bambergdigital.com/): agency overview, services, case studies
- [Services](https://www.bambergdigital.com/services): six service verticals
- [Pricing](https://www.bambergdigital.com/pricing): Starter / Growth / Atelier tiers
- [Atelier](https://www.bambergdigital.com/atelier): premium concierge — custom solutions $10K–$25K, one client per quarter
- [Agentic AI Management](https://www.bambergdigital.com/agentic-ai): lead service — Audit / Stack Build / Managed; capacity-capped
- [AI Integration](https://www.bambergdigital.com/ai-integration): custom AI tooling and workflow automation
- [Web Design](https://www.bambergdigital.com/web-design): conversion-focused custom sites from $497
- [SEO](https://www.bambergdigital.com/seo): SEO systems from $297/mo
- [Lead Generation](https://www.bambergdigital.com/leads): from $199/mo
- [Digital Marketing](https://www.bambergdigital.com/digital-marketing): paid, SEO, content, social
- [Content Creation](https://www.bambergdigital.com/content-creation): blog, video, social
- [Branding](https://www.bambergdigital.com/branding): identity systems
- [Industry Blueprints](https://www.bambergdigital.com/blueprints): 47 vertical-specific website templates
- [Portfolio](https://www.bambergdigital.com/portfolio): client work
- [About](https://www.bambergdigital.com/about): team and approach
- [Story](https://www.bambergdigital.com/story): founder background
- [Demo](https://www.bambergdigital.com/demo): AI readiness audit
- [Contact](https://www.bambergdigital.com/contact): inbound inquiries
